extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter survived chaotic finale after 40km+ breakaway battle, holding off BILBAO Pello and MCNULTY Brandon over final climb.
tactical_patterns: KONOVALOVAS Ignatas dropped back from break to chase for DÉMARE, showing FDJ prioritized maglia ciclamino points defense.
SAGAN Peter won intermediate sprint from breakaway reducing DÉMARE's points jersey lead to 45, attacking classification not stage.
UAE Emirates delayed peloton chase until final climbs, allowing 13-second margin at summit 5km from finish.
FUGLSANG Jakob lost 1+ minute to GC group via late mechanical, exposing vulnerability of isolated leaders without teammates.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: First win in 15 months, answered every acceleration in break then held solo over final climb
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: Took 4 bonus seconds in third, extended GC lead despite lumpy aggressive stage
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: Took 6 bonus seconds in second, moved into GC top-10 showing climbing strength
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: Lost 1+ minute to GC contenders via late mechanical without team support, dropped to 57 seconds back
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: Mechanical on final climb and struggled to follow, exposed fragility on chaotic finales
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: Solo bridged from peloton to leaders on final climb, caught at 5km showing diesel climbing strength
rider_signals.SWIFT Ben: neutral: Survived in late 5-rider break but unable to contest finale against SAGAN
rider_signals.CATALDO Dario: neutral: Animated late break with attacks but lacked punch to drop SAGAN
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: Initially in break but dropped on climbs, confirming TT specialist limits on repeated gradients
